instruction: <FLIGHT>Your user id is ivan_muller_7015 and you want to book the same flights as your current reservation for your friend Ivan in your user profile (Ivan Smith, DOB you can't remember but in your profile). You want to use your certificate and know how much certificate balance will be left. If more than $100 is wasted, you want to instead use your GC and CC. No baggage and insurance.

dialogue_state.initial_segment: book the same flights as your current reservation
dialogue_state.initial_query: book same flights as current reservation

hints.segment: for your friend Ivan in your user profile (Ivan Smith, DOB you can't remember but in your profile)
hints.hint: Book these flights for my friend Ivan Smith from my user profile

hints.segment: if more than $100 is wasted, instead use your GC and CC
hints.hint: If using my certificate leaves more than $100 unused, use my gift card and credit card instead

hints.segment: know how much certificate balance will be left
hints.hint: Tell me how much certificate balance will remain after booking
